---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Thanh Bui"
date: "2026-04-23"
output: html_document
---

```{r eval = T, warning = F, message = F}
library(quantreg)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyverse)
library(sn)
library(lmtest)
library(sandwich)
```


```{r eval = T, warning = F, message = F}
sample_size <- c(50, 100, 200, 450, 700)
repli <- 1000
beta0_original <- 20
beta1_original <- 0.6
sigma_error <- 1.9
mean_error <- 0
beta_error <- 1/7

slope_func <- function(data, indices) {
  d <- data[indices, ]
  fit <- lm(y ~ x, data = d)
  coef(fit)[2]
}
```

```{r}
set.seed(479)
x = runif(700, min = 0, max = 5)
y = beta0_original + beta1_original * x + rnorm(700, mean_error, sigma_error)
df = data.frame(x = x, y = y)

homo_var <- ggplot(df, aes(x, y)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4, col = "gray50") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, aes(color = "OLS")) +
  geom_quantile(quantiles = c(0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 0.9), aes(color = factor(..quantile..))) +
  scale_color_manual(
    name = "Line Type",
    values = c(
      "OLS" = "red",
      "0.25" = "#1f77b4",
      "0.5"  = "#2ca02c",
      "0.75" = "#ff7f0e",
      "0.9"  = "#9467bd"
    ),
    labels = c(
      "OLS" = "OLS",
      "0.25" = "25th Percentile",
      "0.5"  = "Median",
      "0.75" = "75th Percentile",
      "0.9"  = "90th Percentile"
    )
  ) +
  labs(title = "Homocedastic variance",
       x = "X", y = "Y") +
  theme_minimal() + theme(legend.position = "none")

homo_var
saveRDS(homo_var, "homo_var.rds")


x = runif(700, min = 0, max = 5)
y = beta0_original + beta1_original * x + rnorm(700, mean_error, sigma_error) * (1 + x * beta_error)
df = data.frame(x = x, y = y)

heter_var <- ggplot(df, aes(x, y)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4, col = "gray50") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, aes(color = "OLS")) +
  geom_quantile(quantiles = c(0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 0.9), aes(color = factor(..quantile..))) +
  scale_color_manual(
    name = "Line Type",
    values = c(
      "OLS" = "red",
      "0.25" = "#1f77b4",
      "0.5"  = "#2ca02c",
      "0.75" = "#ff7f0e",
      "0.9"  = "#9467bd"
    ),
    labels = c(
      "OLS" = "OLS",
      "0.25" = "25th Percentile",
      "0.5"  = "Median",
      "0.75" = "75th Percentile",
      "0.9"  = "90th Percentile"
    )
  ) +
  labs(title = "Heteroscedastic variance",
       x = "X", y = "Y") +
  theme_minimal()


heter_var
saveRDS(heter_var, "heter_var.rds")

```

```{r eval = T, warning = F, message = F}

```


```{r eval = T, warning = F, message = F}
taus <- c(0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 0.9)

ols_qr_homoscedastic <- list()
for (i in seq_along(sample_size)) {
  results_list <- list()
  n <- sample_size[i]

  for (j in 1:repli) {
    # data set creation
    x <- runif(n, min = 0, max = 5)
    y <- beta0_original + beta1_original * x + rnorm(n, mean_error, sigma_error)
    dat <- data.frame(x = x, y = y)
    
    ols <- lm(y ~ x, data = dat)
    ols_sum <- coeftest(ols, vcov = vcovHC(ols, type = "HC3"))
    slope_ols <- ols_sum[2, 1]
    se_slope_ols    <- ols_sum[2,2]
    pval_ols <- ols_sum[2, 4]
    ci_lower_ols <- slope_ols - 1.96 * se_slope_ols
    ci_upper_ols <- slope_ols + 1.96 * se_slope_ols
    
    
    results_list[[j]] <- tibble(
      Run = j,
      Sample_Size = n,
      Model = "OLS",
      Slope = round(slope_ols, 4),
      Bias = slope_ols - beta1_original,
      SE_Slope = round(se_slope_ols, 4),
      Coverage = (ci_lower_ols <= beta1_original) && (ci_upper_ols >= beta1_original),
      Power = pval_ols < 0.05,
      CI_Lower = round(ci_lower_ols, 4),
      CI_Upper = round(ci_upper_ols, 4),
      True_Slope = beta1_original
    )
    
    for (tau in taus) {
      beta1.true <- beta1_original
      
      qr <- rq(y ~ x, tau = tau, data = dat)
      sum_qr <- summary(qr, se = "nid")
      
      slope_qr <- sum_qr$coefficients["x", "Value"]
      se_slope_qr  <- sum_qr$coefficients["x", "Std. Error"]
      p_qr <- sum_qr$coefficients["x", "Pr(>|t|)"] 
      ci_lower_qr <- slope_qr - 1.96 * se_slope_qr
      ci_upper_qr <- slope_qr + 1.96 * se_slope_qr
      
      results_list[[length(results_list) + 1]] <- tibble(
        Run = j,
        Sample_Size = n,
        Model = paste0("QR_", tau),
        Slope = round(slope_qr, 4),
        Bias = slope_qr - beta1.true,
        SE_Slope = round(se_slope_qr, 4),
        Coverage = (ci_lower_qr <= beta1.true) && (ci_upper_qr >= beta1.true),
        Power = p_qr < 0.05,
        CI_Lower = round(ci_lower_qr, 4),
        CI_Upper = round(ci_upper_qr, 4),
        True_Slope = round(beta1.true, 4)
      )
    }
  }
  ols_qr_homoscedastic[[i]] <- bind_rows(results_list)
}

ols_qr_homoscedastic <- bind_rows(ols_qr_homoscedastic)

head(ols_qr_homoscedastic, n = 6)
```

```{r}
models <- unique(ols_qr_homoscedastic$Model)

# Create the overall multi-model plot ONCE (outside the loop)
slope_all_homo <- ggplot(ols_qr_homoscedastic, 
                          aes(x = factor(Sample_Size), y = Slope, fill = Model)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_hline(data = distinct(ols_qr_homoscedastic, Model, True_Slope),
             aes(yintercept = True_Slope, color = Model), linewidth = 0.8) +
  labs(title = "Estimated vs True Slopes)",
       x = "Sample Size", y = "Estimated Slope") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

print(slope_all_homo)
saveRDS(slope_all_homo, "slope_all_homo.rds")
```

```{r eval = T, warning = F, message = F}
bias_homo <- ggplot(ols_qr_homoscedastic, aes(x = factor(Sample_Size), y = Bias, fill = Model)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red", linewidth = 0.8) +
  labs(title = "Distribution of Bias", x = "Sample Size", y = "Bias")
print(bias_homo)
saveRDS(bias_homo, "Bias_all_homo.rds")
```

```{r eval = T, warning = F, message = F}
power_coverage_homo <- ols_qr_homoscedastic %>%
  group_by(Sample_Size, Model) %>%
  summarise(Power_rate = mean(Power) * 100,
    Coverage_rate = mean(Coverage) * 100,
    .groups = "drop"
  )


power_homo <- ggplot(power_coverage_homo, aes(x = Sample_Size, y = Power_rate, color = Model)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 95, linetype = "dashed", color = "red", linewidth = 0.8) +
  labs(title = "Distribution of Power Rate", x = "Sample Size", y = "Power percentage") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

cover_homo <- ggplot(power_coverage_homo, aes(x = Sample_Size, y = Coverage_rate, color = Model)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 95, linetype = "dashed", color = "red", linewidth = 0.8) +
  annotate("rect", 
           xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
           ymin = 95 - 1.96 * sqrt(0.05 * 0.95/repli)*100,
           ymax = 95 + 1.96 * sqrt(0.05 * 0.95/repli)*100,
           alpha = 0.1, fill = "blue") +
  labs(title = "Distribution of Coverage Rate", x = "Sample Size", y = "Coverage percentage")

library(patchwork)
power_homo | cover_homo

saveRDS(power_homo, "power_homo.rds")
saveRDS(cover_homo, "cover_homo.rds")
```


```{r eval = T, warning = F, message = F}
set.seed(479)
typeI_results <- list()

for (i in seq_along(sample_size)) {
  n <- sample_size[i]
  
  reject_ols <- logical(repli)
  reject_qr  <- matrix(FALSE, nrow = repli, ncol = length(taus))
 
  for (j in 1:repli) {
    error <- rnorm(n, mean = mean_error, sd = sigma_error)
    x <- runif(n, 0, 5)
    y <- beta0_original + 0 * x + error
    dat <- data.frame(x = x, y = y)
   
    # OLS
    ols_fit <- lm(y ~ x, data = dat)
    p_ols <- summary(ols_fit)$coefficients["x", "Pr(>|t|)"]
    reject_ols[j] <- p_ols < 0.05
    
    # QR - only record rejections here
    for (k in seq_along(taus)) {
      tau <- taus[k]
      qr_fit <- rq(y ~ x, tau = tau, data = dat)
      sum_qr <- summary(qr_fit, se = "nid")
      se_qr <- sum_qr$coefficients["x", "Std. Error"]
      ci_l  <- coef(qr_fit)[2] - 1.96 * se_qr
      ci_u  <- coef(qr_fit)[2] + 1.96 * se_qr
      
      reject_qr[j, k] <- (ci_l > 0) || (ci_u < 0)
    }
  }
  
  # OLS Summary
  p_ols <- mean(reject_ols)
  se_ols <- sqrt(p_ols * (1 - p_ols) / repli)
  ci_ols_lower <- p_ols - 1.96 * se_ols
  ci_ols_upper <- p_ols + 1.96 * se_ols
  
  typeI_results <- append(typeI_results, list(
    tibble(
      Sample_Size = n,
      Model = "OLS",
      TypeI_Error = p_ols,
      TypeI_Lower = ci_ols_lower,
      TypeI_Upper = ci_ols_upper
    )
  ))
  
  # QR Summary - one per tau
  for (k in seq_along(taus)) {
    tau <- taus[k]
    p_qr <- mean(reject_qr[, k])
    se_qr <- sqrt(p_qr * (1 - p_qr) / repli)
    ci_qr_lower <- p_qr - 1.96 * se_qr
    ci_qr_upper <- p_qr + 1.96 * se_qr
    
    typeI_results <- append(typeI_results, list(
      tibble(
        Sample_Size = n,
        Model = paste0("QR_", tau),
        TypeI_Error = p_qr,
        TypeI_Lower = ci_qr_lower,
        TypeI_Upper = ci_qr_upper
      )
    ))
  }
}

typeI_df <- bind_rows(typeI_results)

# Display nice table
typeI_df %>%
  select(Sample_Size, Model, TypeI_Error, TypeI_Lower, TypeI_Upper) %>%
  arrange(Sample_Size, Model)
```



```{r eval = T, warning = F, message = F}
typei_2models_norm <- ggplot(typeI_df, aes(x = factor(Sample_Size), y = TypeI_Error, color = Model)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.05, linetype = "dashed", color = "red", linewidth = 0.8) +
  annotate("rect", 
           xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
           ymin = 0.05 - 1.96 * sqrt(0.05 * 0.95 / repli),
           ymax = 0.05 + 1.96 * sqrt(0.05 * 0.95 / repli),
           alpha = 0.1, fill = "blue") +
  labs(title = "Type I Error Rate",
       x = "Sample Size",
       y = "Type I Error Rate") +
  theme_minimal()

saveRDS(typei_2models_norm, "typei_2models_norm.rds")
typei_2models_norm
```

```{r}

```
